'''vathatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zedoary|zedoary]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zedoary|zedoary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vathatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væthæthæth|væthæthæth]] || [[word:væthæthæj|væthæthæj]] || [[word:væthæthæsh|væthæthæsh]] || [[word:væthæthæ|væthæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathathathath|vathathathath]] || [[word:vathathathaj|vathathathaj]] || [[word:vathathathash|vathathathash]] || [[word:vathathatha|vathathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathathath|vathathath]] || [[word:vathathaj|vathathaj]] || [[word:vathathash|vathathash]] || [[word:vathatha|vathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathafthath|vathafthath]] || [[word:vathafthaj|vathafthaj]] || [[word:vathafthash|vathafthash]] || [[word:vathafthaf|vathafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vathathatha|vathathatha]] || [[word:vathathaja|vathathaja]] || [[word:vathathasha|vathathasha]] || [[word:vathathaka|vathathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vathathath|vathathath]] || [[word:vathathaj|vathathaj]] || [[word:vathathash|vathathash]] || [[word:vathatha|vathatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vathathathal|vathathathal]] || [[word:vathathajal|vathathajal]] || [[word:vathathashal|vathathashal]] || [[word:vathathakal|vathathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vathathathatha|vathathathatha]] || [[word:vathathajaja|vathathajaja]] || [[word:vathathashasha|vathathashasha]] || [[word:vathathaka|vathathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vathathathan|vathathathan]] || [[word:vathathajan|vathathajan]] || [[word:vathathashan|vathathashan]] || [[word:vathathakan|vathathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vathathathaoro|vathathathaoro]] || [[word:vathathajaoro|vathathajaoro]] || [[word:vathathashaoro|vathathashaoro]] || [[word:vathathakaoro|vathathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
